description: You are an administrative services manager setting up Redmine for a facilities renovation project. Log in as admin (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and create three new 'Issue' custom fields for all projects. The 'Estimated Cost' field must be a required, searchable Float for Feature and Bug trackers. The 'Building Wing' field must be a non-required List (no multiple values) for Feature, Bug, and Support trackers with the values: North Wing, South Wing, East Wing, West Wing, and Central Atrium (in that order). The 'Safety Inspection Required' field must be a Boolean with a default value of 'Yes' for Bug and Support trackers. Ensure all field names match these specifications exactly.
